summary: Full-stack regression for Padel Match MVP. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (venues, players, kunal stats, recommendations, leaderboard, games join/leave, match score + Elo, player create with initial rating, notifications). Frontend: verified onboarding identity screen with PADEL MATCH wordmark, demo login (testID quick-demo-login) → home dashboard with greeting + stat strip 7.2/#4/23/61%, STRONG MATCHES section with coral cards + lime STRONG/GOOD MATCH badges, PLAYERS THIS WEEK chips, RECENT RESULTS with WIN/LOSS badges and DM Mono scores, 5-tab bottom nav (HOME/GAMES/Create raised lime/RANKS/PROFILE), Games feed (TODAY/WEEK/ALL + AVAILABLE/ALL tabs + GameCards), Game detail (coral venue header, 2x2 player grid, JOIN GAME and BOOK COURT ON HUDLE buttons), join flow toggles slot grid and CTA to YOU'RE IN, Leaderboard with #1 lime podium and Kunal coral highlighted row #4, Profile with blue hero band, 88px 7.2 rating, SETTLED status, coral #4 band, stat strip, sparkline, radar, Create Game step 1 with venues + courts, Score entry screen with two team panels + CONFIRM SCORE, Notifications list with 5 typed coloured icon squares.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'YOU'RE IN ✓ TAP TO LEAVE' button renders text in white/cream on ink black background but text colour appears nearly invisible in the rendered web build (label text exists in DOM but visually low-contrast/clipped). Worth verifying labelColor against filledColor=ink.

action_items: (Optional polish) Ensure the leave-game SplitCTA label colour contrasts against the ink fill — currently 'YOU\'RE IN ✓ TAP TO LEAVE' is hard to read in the web preview.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~900 lines single-file — fine for an MVP but consider splitting models / seed / routes for maintainability.
POST /api/matches/{mid}/score does not validate set scores (e.g., a set like 0-0 or both teams winning the same number of sets ties to pairB by default). Add input validation.
Recommendations endpoint queries games for the next 14 days (not 7) while the spec mentioned 7 days — minor inconsistency.
frontend/.env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct for Expo public env). System prompt mentions EXPO_BACKEND_URL — confirm the api.ts client reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via process.env.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used POST /api/dev/reseed before pytest to ensure deterministic state. Test player rows created via POST /api/players are prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://874f8ef7-d563-4ff2-a2c5-db247cafa924.preview.emergentagent.com — all /api/* routes verified. pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runnable as: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Use POST /api/dev/reseed to reset state. Frontend demo login uses testID=quick-demo-login on /onboarding/identity. Game card testIDs use prefix game-card-{id}. Join/leave use testIDs join-game / leave-game (NOT join-game-btn). Bottom tab labels are rendered as text — query by text 'HOME'/'GAMES'/'RANKS'/'PROFILE' (exact=True) or use tab-create for the raised + tab. Score screen accessible at /score/{matchId}. Notifications at /notifications.
